description: Create ai_core/self_improver.cpp - Self-improvement engine that logs gaps, plans research, tracks growth
steps: Implement knowledge gap categorization by topic
Implement integration hooks with autonomous_agent for auto-research
acceptance_criteria: File compiles without errors as part of make all
verification: Run make all and confirm zero compile errors
findings: Created ai_core/self_improver.cpp with knowledge gap logging, topic categorization (13 categories), improvement plan generation, growth snapshots, weekly reports, and accuracy trend tracking. Integrates with autonomous_agent via gap research/resolve hooks. Compiles cleanly.
